common.contactDescription: For any questions, you can contact our team directly.

about.title: About DealTogether
about.intro: DealTogether is a group buying platform designed to make everyday products more accessible through the power of collective action.

sections.title: About DealTogether
paragraphs: DealTogether is a group buying platform designed to make everyday products more accessible through the power of collective action.

We start from a simple observation: prices are often high not because of the actual cost of the products, but because of intermediaries, insufficient volumes, and a lack of coordination between buyers. DealTogether changes this dynamic.
Our platform allows individuals to group together to buy as a group, and thus:
bullets: access quality products at a better price
create a community of supportive buyers

sections.title: How it works
paragraphs: DealTogether connects three players:
bullets: Buyers : join or initiate group purchases
The platform : facilitates, secures and structures transactions
When a minimum number of buyers is reached, the prize is unlocked for everyone.

sections.title: Our vision
paragraphs: We believe in a smarter and fairer model of consumption:
bullets: DealTogether is not just about selling: we are building a collaborative ecosystem where everyone wins.

sections.title: For whom?
bullets: New arrivals with no purchase history
Families looking to reduce their expenses

sections.title: Our commitment
paragraphs: We are committed to:
bullets: to ensure a simple and secure experience
DealTogether is more than a platform: it's a new way to buy, together.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.intro: Our mission is to democratize access to quality products at reduced prices by harnessing the power of collective purchasing.

sections.title: Our mission
paragraphs: Our mission is to democratize access to quality products at reduced prices by harnessing the power of collective purchasing.

sections.title: What we want to change
paragraphs: Traditional commerce promotes:
bullets: Meanwhile, consumers are paying more, often without any real alternative.

sections.title: How we achieve this
paragraphs: We allow several people to come together to:
bullets: access to prices usually reserved for wholesale

sections.title: Social impact
paragraphs: Our mission also has a strong social dimension:
bullets: facilitate access to housing and essential goods
to help newcomers integrate better economically
supporting communities often excluded from the best deals

sections.title: Our values
bullets: Community : buying together means winning together

sections.title: Our ambition
paragraphs: To become the benchmark for group buying in Canada, then internationally, by building a simple, reliable and inclusive platform.
DealTogether is about transforming every purchase into a collective opportunity.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.intro: DealTogether lets you buy better and cheaper through group buying. Here's how to take full advantage of the platform:

sections.title: 1. Discover the offers
paragraphs: Browse the offers available on the platform:
bullets: the price displayed on the current market

sections.title: 2. Join a group purchase
paragraphs: Select an offer and join an existing group or start your own:

sections.title: 3. Book & pay
paragraphs: You validate a deal and confirm the payment.
Your payment will be processed subject to the deal being completed.
Payment is validated when the deal is complete with the number of buyers required by the seller.

sections.title: 4. Offer activation
paragraphs: When the required number of buyers is reached:
bullets: The final prize has been awarded.

sections.title: 5. Delivery or pickup
paragraphs: You will receive your product:
bullets: The delivery times are specified by the seller.

sections.title: Tip
paragraphs: Invite your friends and family to join your group to unlock the best prices faster.
Buy together, save more.

faq.title: FAQ – Buyers
faq.intro: We are here to make your experience simple, transparent, and advantageous.

sections.title: How to get the best price?
paragraphs: The price decreases as the number of buyers increases. The more of you there are, the more you save.

sections.title: What happens if the group is not completed?
paragraphs: The order is cancelled.
You will not be charged or you will be refunded

sections.title: When will I be charged?
paragraphs: Depending on the offer:
either immediately (with a money-back guarantee)
only when the deal is validated

sections.title: Are the products guaranteed?
paragraphs: Yes. All sellers are selected and must meet quality standards.

sections.title: Can I cancel my order?
paragraphs: Yes, under certain conditions specified in the refund policy.

sections.title: How long does delivery take?
paragraphs: Delivery times vary depending on the supplier and are indicated on each offer.

sections.title: What should I do if I encounter a problem?
paragraphs: You can contact support or report a problem directly from your account.

sections.title: Can I create my own group?
paragraphs: Yes. You can initiate a group purchase and invite others to join you.

sections.title: Are the payments secure?
paragraphs: Yes. All transactions are processed through certified providers.

refunds.title: Refund Policy
refunds.intro: If the purchase threshold is not reached, no payment is debited or a refund is issued.

sections.title: 1. Group cancellation
paragraphs: If the purchase threshold is not reached:
bullets: No payment is debited or a refund is issued.

sections.title: 2. Non-conforming products
paragraphs: You can request a refund if:
bullets: The product does not match the description

sections.title: 3. Deadlines
paragraphs: Requests must be made within 7 days of receipt .

sections.title: 5. Refund method
paragraphs: Refund via the original payment method

sections.title: 6. Exceptions
paragraphs: Some products may be non-refundable (indicated on the product page).

sections.title: 7. Contact
paragraphs: For any questions: contact@hanacalgary.ca

terms.title: DealTogether Terms of Use
terms.intro: By accessing and using the DealTogether platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of conditions
paragraphs: By accessing and using the DealTogether platform (“the Platform”), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, you must not use our services.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
paragraphs: DealTogether is a group buying platform that connects:
bullets: of the buyers wishing to benefit from reduced prices
of the sellers / suppliers offering products or services
The offers are activated when the minimum number of participants is reached.

sections.title: 3. Account Creation
paragraphs: You agree to:
bullets: You are responsible for all activity on your account.
DealTogether reserves the right to suspend or delete an account in case of violation.

sections.title: 4. How purchasing works
bullets: Prices depend on the volume of buyers.
A transaction may be cancelled if the minimum threshold is not reached
Delivery times are provided by the sellers.

sections.title: 5. Payment
bullets: Payments are secured through third-party providers.
Payment can be authorized at the time of ordering.
The flow rate may be conditional upon validation by the group

sections.title: 6. Responsibilities of sellers
paragraphs: The sellers agree to:
bullets: DealTogether acts as an intermediary and is not the seller of the products.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: DealTogether cannot be held responsible:

sections.title: 8. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All content (logo, texts, design) is the property of DealTogether and may not be used without permission.

sections.title: 9. Termination
paragraphs: We may suspend or terminate your access at any time if you fail to comply with the terms and conditions.

sections.title: 10. Applicable Law
paragraphs: These conditions are governed by the laws of the province of Alberta and Canada.

sections.title: 11. Contact
paragraphs: For any questions: contact@hanacalgary.ca
